title: Memory & Key/Credential Management

classes.name: SecretStr
methods: use(self) -> str  # returns raw secret value
__repr__(self) -> str  # masked preview, never exposes full value
classes.notes: Wraps a secret string to prevent accidental printing. Preview truncates: ≤4 chars → '***', ≤16 → first3···last3, ≤40 → first6···last6 len=N, else first10···last6 len=N

classes.name: _Keys
attributes: _d: dict  # internal key-value store loaded from disk
methods: __init__(self)  # loads ~/ga_keychain.enc via XOR decode on init; renames to .enc.bak on corrupt
__getattr__(self, k: str) -> SecretStr  # raises AttributeError for '_' prefix, KeyError if missing
set(self, k: str, v: str = None, *, file: str = None)  # stores secret; if file given reads file content; persists via XOR encode
ls(self) -> list  # returns list of stored key names
classes.notes: Singleton instantiated as module-level `keys`. Module __getattr__ delegates to keys for pass-through access.

classes.name: mykey_template / mykey.py (config module)
attributes: mixin_config: dict  # MixinSession failover config: llm_nos, max_retries, base_delay
native_claude_config1: dict  # NativeClaudeSession — second relay with 1m context beta
native_oai_config: dict  # NativeOAISession — OpenAI native tool calling
config_dict_fields: name: str  # session display name, used as mixin reference key
apikey: str  # sk-ant-* → x-api-key header; others → Authorization: Bearer
apibase: str  # endpoint; auto-appends /v1/chat/completions if needed
model: str  # model id; [1m] suffix triggers context-1m-2025-08-07 beta
fake_cc_system_prompt: bool  # required True for CC-switch/relay proxies
stream: bool  # default True; False for non-SSE endpoints
classes.notes: Template file; user copies to mykey.py and fills real credentials. agentmain.py scans variables whose names contain 'api'/'config'/'cookie' to build sessions.

module_level_elements.name: _MASK
module_level_elements.description: Per-user XOR mask derived at import time

module_level_elements.name: _xor(data: bytes) -> bytes
module_level_elements.description: XOR obfuscation using _MASK (cyclic). Used for both encode and decode.

module_level_elements.name: keys
module_level_elements.description: Module-level _Keys instance; module __getattr__ forwards to it

module_level_elements.name: __getattr__(name)
module_level_elements.description: Forwards attribute access on the keychain module to the `keys` singleton

llmcore_integration.logic: Tries `import mykey; return vars(mykey)` (excluding _-prefixed); falls back to reading mykey.json; raises if neither found
llmcore_integration.lazy_global: mykeys and proxies are lazy-loaded via llmcore.__getattr__; cached into llmcore globals on first access

key_relationships: _Keys creates SecretStr (composition) — __getattr__ wraps raw string in SecretStr
keychain.keys (singleton) is the module-level public interface
llmcore exposes mykeys: dict (plain dict, not SecretStr-wrapped)
agentmain.py depends_on llmcore.mykeys — iterates to instantiate LLM sessions
frontends (tgapp, qqapp, fsapp, wecomapp, dingtalkapp) depend_on llmcore.mykeys — read bot tokens, app secrets, allowed users

system_1_keychain.access_pattern: keys.set('name', 'value') to store; keys.name.use() to retrieve
system_1_keychain.protection: SecretStr masks value in repr; .use() required to get raw string

system_2_mykey.storage: Python module or mykey.json on disk (plaintext/unencrypted)
system_2_mykey.protection: None — plain dict; file-system access control only

session_type_selection_logic.description: agentmain.py selects session class based on variable name keywords in mykey.py

important_notes: save_token in IR is a mis-parse of ToolClient.auto_save_tokens in llmcore.py — not a standalone class in this scope
_Keys is named _Keys (private) but exposed as public `keys` singleton and via module __getattr__
XOR obfuscation is NOT encryption — provides only basic obfuscation, not cryptographic security
mykey.py credentials are in plaintext; keychain.enc is XOR-obfuscated (user-specific mask)
NativeClaudeSession auto-detects sk-ant- prefix for x-api-key vs Bearer auth header
